vibe: Objective, functional, rigid, 'Control Room' aesthetic tailored for logistics operators.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid - Tightly packed, high information density. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.container: h-screen w-full flex flex-col md:flex-row bg-surface text-text_main overflow-hidden

grid_system.main: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 h-full w-full gap-0 border-collapse
grid_system.left_sidebar: lg:col-span-3 border-r border-border bg-card_background flex flex-col h-full
grid_system.center_chat: lg:col-span-5 border-r border-border bg-background flex flex-col h-full

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4 md:p-6 for container padding, gap-4 for internal widget spacing

surface_styles.panels: Flat background, 1px hard border, no shadow. Technical, exposed skeleton look.
surface_styles.inputs: bg-surface border border-border rounded-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary transition-all

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-none hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors font-medium px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_main rounded-none hover:bg-surface transition-colors font-medium px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-text_muted hover:text-text_main hover:bg-surface transition-colors px-3 py-1.5

document_upload_zone.style: Border dashed 2px border-border hover:border-primary bg-surface transition-colors p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer min-h-[160px]
document_upload_zone.instructions: Must have an iconic upload state (Phosphor 'TrayArrowUp' icon). Show document status (Processing/Ready) with an inline tag. Add 'data-testid="upload-dropzone"'.

document_status_indicator.style: px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest border border-border bg-surface text-text_muted flex items-center gap-2
document_status_indicator.instructions: Use a blinking 'circle' icon when processing. Include 'data-testid="doc-status-indicator"'.

chat_interface.user_message: bg-surface border border-border p-4 ml-auto max-w-[85%] text-sm
chat_interface.ai_message: bg-background border-l-4 border-primary p-4 mr-auto max-w-[95%] text-sm shadow-sm
chat_interface.input_area: p-4 border-t border-border bg-background flex gap-2

confidence_score.style: px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase inline-flex items-center gap-1 absolute top-2 right-2
confidence_score.instructions: Always attach this to the AI response block. Must show percentage. Add 'data-testid="confidence-score"'.

structured_extraction.button: w-full border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all p-3 font-mono text-sm uppercase flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-4
structured_extraction.json_preview: bg-text_main text-surface p-4 font-mono text-xs overflow-x-auto mt-2
structured_extraction.instructions: Use Phosphor 'BracketsCurly' icon. Pre-styled as a tech terminal output. Add 'data-testid="extract-json-button"'.

source_text_display.container: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 bg-surface font-mono text-xs leading-loose relative
source_text_display.instructions: Should resemble a raw document viewer. Add 'data-testid="source-viewer"'.

icons.instructions: Install using 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react'. Use weight='duotone' or 'regular'.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background color changes on interactive elements. Avoid heavy scales/transforms in this brutalist design.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a strictly dashboard/app environment (POC inside a TMS).
Prioritize screen real estate: NO massive hero sections. Use the 3-panel layout described in grid_system.
Implement the UI using plain .js + JSX components with Tailwind.
For the document AI dashboard: Left sidebar = Upload & JSON Extract. Center = Chat/Q&A. Right = Source Document Viewer.
DO NOT use generic rounded corners everywhere. Use sharp edges (rounded-none) to stick to the 'Swiss Brutalism / Technical' archetype.
Ensure the fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono) are imported into the main index.css or index.html.
Strictly apply data-testid attributes to all interactive elements as defined.
Color '#0038FF' is the primary action color. Do not overuse it. The majority of the screen should be monochrome/white/gray.
Use Shadcn UI components for dropdowns, tooltips, or complex inputs, but strip their default borders and radii to match this brutalist flat theme.
All components must be in .js files (e.g., App.js, DocumentUploader.js), not .tsx.
